title: Manufacturing at Scale
shortSummary: Building rockets fast — vertical integration, 3D-printed engines, automated welding, and SpaceX's manufacturing revolution that makes reusability economically viable.
whyItMatters: SpaceX's greatest innovation may not be reusability — it is manufacturing speed. Building a Raptor engine every 48 hours, vertically integrating production, and 3D-printing critical components has fundamentally changed the economics of spaceflight. Manufacturing is where rocket science meets the real world.
coreConcepts: Friction stir welding and automated fabrication
